overall.description: Gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character riding a horse through a moonlit wilderness. The rider travels from grassy meadows into a shallow river and continues along the forested riverbank under a bright full moon.

events.description: approaching the riverbank, terrain changes from grass to water's edge

agents.ego_description: character riding a horse at steady pace through open meadow toward a river

entered.detail: bright full moon illuminating the night sky above the mountains
dense pine trees covering the hillside on the left
dark silhouette of mountains against the night sky
open grassland with tall grass swaying in the wind

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a moonlit grassland meadow with a character riding a horse toward a distant river. Pine forests line the hillsides while a bright full moon hangs overhead, casting cool blue light across the open terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with reflective water surface

events.description: horse enters the river water, slowing pace as it wades through
horse exits the river onto the opposite bank, resuming normal speed

agents.ego_description: character carefully guiding the horse through the shallow river water, creating splashes and ripples

entered.detail: shallow river with rippling surface reflecting moonlight

segments.scene_description: The horse enters a shallow river, wading through water that reflects the moonlight. The movement slows as the horse navigates the current, with forested banks visible on either side of the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested riverbank trail with rocky outcrops

events.description: entering denser tree cover, ambient light decreases significantly

agents.ego_description: character riding along the riverbank, navigating between trees and rocky terrain while following the water's edge

entered.detail: rocky outcrop and boulders along the riverbank
misty valley visible in the distance between the hills

segments.scene_description: After crossing the river, the rider continues along a narrow grassy trail bordered by dense pine trees on one side and the river on the other. The terrain becomes more enclosed with rocky outcrops, and the lighting grows darker as the canopy thickens.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, moonlit meadow into a dense, enclosed riverside forest. It begins with a rider on horseback traversing a wide grassland under a bright full moon that casts a cool blue glow over distant pine-covered hills. As the horse descends from the meadow, the scene shifts to a shallow river where the water reflects the moonlight while the rider wades through the current. The camera then follows the horse as it exits the water and turns onto a narrow grassy trail, with the environment gradually tightening between the river's edge and a wall of thick pines. Finally, the terrain becomes more rugged with rocky outcrops as the canopy closes in, causing the lighting to grow darker and more intimate.
